problem id: f24b8bee
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  11010100 -> 10011010
  10110011 -> 01110110
  11111001 -> 00111111
  00111111 -> 11100111
  00010010 -> 01000010
  01111000 -> 00001111
  10110110 -> 11010110
  10010100 -> 10010010
  01101000 -> 00001101

query: 11000110
predicted answer: 11011000
